title: $SERVER
text: $SERVER Set the proxy server to be used by the UHTTP component. $SERVER { = } URL Defaults Assignment file: application files Section: [PROXY_SETTINGS] Default value: none Description $SERVER determines which proxy server is used by the UHTTP component. On Microsoft Windows, if this setting is omitted, then the UHTTP component uses the registry settings. [PROXY_SETTINGS] $SERVER = http://www.proxy-server.company.com:8001 Copy Related Links UHTTP The Uniface UHTTP component is an HTTP client that is used for sending and receiving HTTP requests and responses. It provides operations for executing HTTP requests used for web applications and RESTful web services. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
